name: sales_dataflow
description: Dataflow Gen2: Sales data transformations from Lakehouse Silver to Fabric Warehouse Gold layer

queries.name: SalesSilver
queries.description: Read cleaned sales data from Silver Delta Table

querySteps.name: Source
querySteps.expression:
let
    Source = Lakehouse.Contents(null, [workspaceId = "YOUR_WORKSPACE_ID", lakehouseId = "YOUR_LAKEHOUSE_ID"]),
    Tables = Source{[Id="Tables"]}[Data],
    SilverSales = Tables{[Schema="silver",Item="sales"]}[Data]
in
    SilverSales

querySteps.name: TypeConversions
querySteps.expression: Table.TransformColumnTypes(SelectColumns, {{"order_date", type date}, {"ship_date", type date}, {"quantity", Int32.Type}, {"unit_price", type number}, {"gross_sales", type number}, {"net_sales", type number}, {"profit", type number}})

queries.name: CustomersSilver
queries.description: Read cleaned customers from Silver Delta Table

querySteps.name: Source
querySteps.expression:
let
    Source = Lakehouse.Contents(null, [workspaceId = "YOUR_WORKSPACE_ID", lakehouseId = "YOUR_LAKEHOUSE_ID"]),
    Tables = Source{[Id="Tables"]}[Data],
    SilverCustomers = Tables{[Schema="silver",Item="customers"]}[Data]
in
    SilverCustomers

queries.name: ProductsSilver
queries.description: Read cleaned products from Silver Delta Table

querySteps.name: Source
querySteps.expression:
let
    Source = Lakehouse.Contents(null, [workspaceId = "YOUR_WORKSPACE_ID", lakehouseId = "YOUR_LAKEHOUSE_ID"]),
    Tables = Source{[Id="Tables"]}[Data],
    SilverProducts = Tables{[Schema="silver",Item="products"]}[Data]
in
    SilverProducts
